summary: Mobile Search Page UI Refinements & Compare Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested: (1) Mobile page loads with clean venue cards - no image dot indicators, no 'Trending' labels, no Verified badges next to venue names. (2) Each card shows 'Compare' button at bottom-right. (3) Compare button toggles to 'Added' state with gold background when clicked. (4) Floating compare bar shows venue name chips (not thumbnails). (5) Compare bar shows 'Compare (N)' gold button. (6) Clicking chip removes venue from compare. (7) CompareSheet opens with side-by-side comparison (images, prices, capacity, type, amenities). (8) CompareSheet closes when X clicked. (9) Max 3 venues - 4th is disabled. (10) Desktop search page loads with sidebar filters and venue grid. (11) Sort and Venue Type filter popovers work on mobile.

issues: VL VERIFIED badges still shown on desktop cards - this is expected/correct as the requirement was only to remove from mobile

tests.test: Cards load without image dot indicators
Cards load without 'Trending' labels
Cards load without Verified badge checkmarks next to names
Each card shows 'Compare' text button at bottom-right
Compare button has Scale icon and 'Compare' text
Clicking Compare toggles to 'Added' state
Added state shows gold background
Clicking Added toggles back to Compare state
Floating compare bar appears when venues selected
Bar shows venue name chips (not thumbnails)
Chips show shortened venue names
Bar shows 'Compare (N)' gold button
Clicking chip X removes venue from compare
CompareSheet opens when Compare button clicked
CompareSheet shows venue images
CompareSheet shows Price/Plate, Non-Veg/Plate
CompareSheet shows Capacity range
CompareSheet shows venue Type
CompareSheet shows amenities (Parking, AC, etc)
CompareSheet closes when X button clicked
Maximum 3 venues can be selected
4th venue Compare button disabled with opacity-30 and cursor-not-allowed
Sort popover opens with options (Recommended, Price Low to High, etc)
Venue Type filter popover opens with multi-select checkboxes
Selected venue types show as chip with count
Header present
Sidebar filters present (City, Event Type, Venue Type, Setting, Guest Count, Price, Rating, Amenities)
Venue grid displays 79 venues in 2-column layout
Sort dropdown present
View toggle (list/map) buttons present
Sidebar collapse toggle works
Footer present

critical_code_review_comments: Minor console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in VenueSearchPage when changing venue type filter - React setState in render warning (low priority, does not affect functionality)
test_credentials: N/A - No auth required for search page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile search page refinements complete. Key data-testids: venue-card-{venue_id}, venue-card-compare-{venue_id}, compare-floating-bar, compare-chip-{venue_id}, compare-now-btn, compare-sheet, compare-close-btn, compare-remove-{venue_id}, mobile-sort-btn, mobile-venue-type-filter, mobile-more-filters, mobile-search-input. MobileVenueCard does NOT have verified badges or Trending labels - only desktop VenueCard has VL VERIFIED badge. Compare feature is frontend-only state management (no backend API).
